answer_format_extra_text: Returned narrative explanatory text instead of the terse value/status format the task expected.
blood_pressure_observation_wrong_schema: Recorded blood pressure using an invalid Observation structure/fields rather than proper BP coding and components.
potassium_replacement_dose_misapplied: Detected low potassium but selected the wrong replacement regimen/dose for the observed level.
date_upper_bound_omitted: Applied only a lower date bound for a last-24-hours query and omitted the upper bound cutoff.
patient_id_not_resolved_for_order: Created an order using the MRN-style identifier as the subject reference instead of the resolved patient resource id.
incorrect_age_computation: Returned the wrong patient age after lookup, indicating an error in age calculation from birthDate.
stale_lab_not_reordered: Reported an outdated lab result without placing the required repeat order for an old result.
wrong_patient_reference_in_query: Queried using an incorrect patient reference format/value, so the target observations were missed.
malformed_query_string: Built an invalid search URL/query string, causing the lookup to fail.
low_threshold_boundary_misclassified: Treated a boundary value at the replacement threshold as normal instead of low/replaceable.
required_status_field_omitted: Returned the lab value/date but omitted the required order-status/result-status field in the final answer.
false_no_result_after_successful_query: Queried the correct resource with plausible filters but still returned -1/not found instead of extracting the available result.
potassium_repletion_threshold_too_low: Treated potassium values below the replacement target as normal because the low/replete cutoff was set too low.
selected_first_result_not_latest: Read a bundle of observations but returned the first entry instead of identifying the most recent result by timestamp.
answer_includes_unexpected_unit_field: Inserted the lab unit as an extra answer element instead of returning only the requested value/date/status structure.
generic_no_order_status_text: Used a vague 'No order placed' status instead of the task-specific no-order wording for the requested intervention.
redundant_requery_overwrote_correct_answ: After already finding the correct result, repeated the lookup and replaced it with a different stale/incorrect final answer.
split_status_into_extra_field: Returned the two order-status statements as separate output fields when the task expected a single combined status field.
ordered_status_text_mismatch: Returned a non-canonical new-order status phrase, causing the final status text to mismatch the expected wording.
duplicate_order_submitted: Posted the same order twice after already successfully creating it.
subject_reference_missing_patient_prefix: Created the order with a raw patient id in subject.reference instead of the required Patient/{id} reference format.
followup_order_status_omitted: Returned the lab value and replacement status but omitted the separately required follow-up lab order status.
patient_id_not_resolved_for_observation: Created a new Observation using the MRN/raw identifier instead of resolving and using the actual Patient resource id/reference.
